title: calophyllum pauciflorum
intro: Calophyllum pauciflorum, also known as the 'Few-Flowered Calophyllum' or 'Kamani', is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. This tropical evergreen tree is native to the Pacific Islands and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds which contain a high concentration of calophyllolide, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum pauciflorum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum pauciflorum include oil extracts and seeds which are used in traditional medicine and are also being studied for their potential uses in modern pharmacology.
